calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Continued To Apr-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Allen and Gillian Jones for Anna Yang.

The Court expressed concern and questioned whether independent review is necessary for Cynthia and Christina regarding their understanding of the proposed changes. Mr. Allen stated that he does not believe more detailed consents are necessary and the trust is complex. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust was continued to April 9, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of broader consents. The matter will be deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Continued To Mar-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
